text.title: ada-title-ii-compliance-2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ada-title-ii-compliance-2026 as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent auto-applies WCAG 2.2 success criteria as required under Title II.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: WCAG 2.2 SCs are not part of the DOJ final rule; marking them required overstates the legal obligation.

failure-mode.description: Agent marks pre-existing PDFs as exempt from all accessibility requirements.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-existing PDFs must still be remediated on request even if created before the compliance deadline; the exemption is not blanket.

failure-mode.description: Agent claims embedded third-party content is not in scope for the covered entity.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Third-party content embedded in a covered entity's site can still trigger the covered entity's compliance obligation.

failure-mode.description: Agent drafts an undue-burden claim without legal and financial analysis.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Undue-burden defenses under Title II require entity-level financial analysis; an agent lacks the standing and data to make this determination.
